creator: ler@lerbsd.lerctr.org
text:
XFree86 4.0 X Server make install dies on a compile error

How-To-Repeat: 
This is with a ports tree cvsup'd last night (USA CDT GMT-0500):
lerbsd# pwd
/usr/ports/x11-servers
lerbsd# cd XFree86-4-Server
lerbsd# ls
Makefile        files           pkg             scripts         work
lerbsd# make
lerbsd# make install
===>  Installing for XFree86-Server-4.0
